---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new backtesting scenario, audit check, or safety gate improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when..."

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Safety considerations
Does this feature involve any of the following? If yes, explain how safety is maintained:
- [ ] Live order placement or execution
- [ ] Private key or wallet signing
- [ ] Real asset movement
- [ ] External API calls that could affect live markets

> **Note:** Features that cross [Hard Safety Boundaries](../README.md#hard-safety-boundaries) require a separate security design review before implementation.

## Additional context
Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
